query: SHOW COLUMNS FROM after_sales_services WHERE Field LIKE '%brand%' OR Field LIKE '%warranty%' OR Field LIKE '%model%' OR Field LIKE '%component%' OR Field LIKE '%defect%' OR Field LIKE '%purchase%' OR Field LIKE '%delivery%' OR Field LIKE '%usage%' OR Field LIKE '%original%' OR Field LIKE '%modified%' OR Field LIKE '%maintenance%' OR Field LIKE '%chemistry%' OR Field LIKE '%hydrogen%' OR Field LIKE '%product_line%' OR Field LIKE '%productLine%';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user KKo9odT1HVTXECY.26f2cde391d3 --database jX4Ppf2KXZ8z9Tppipem7T --execute SHOW COLUMNS FROM after_sales_services WHERE Field LIKE '%brand%' OR Field LIKE '%warranty%' OR Field LIKE '%model%' OR Field LIKE '%component%' OR Field LIKE '%defect%' OR Field LIKE '%purchase%' OR Field LIKE '%delivery%' OR Field LIKE '%usage%' OR Field LIKE '%original%' OR Field LIKE '%modified%' OR Field LIKE '%maintenance%' OR Field LIKE '%chemistry%' OR Field LIKE '%hydrogen%' OR Field LIKE '%product_line%' OR Field LIKE '%productLine%';
stdout:
Field	Type	Null	Key	Default	Extra
brand	enum('MARKET_SPAS','WELLIS_CLASSIC','WELLIS_LIFE','WELLIS_WIBES','PASSION_SPAS','PLATINUM_SPAS')	YES		NULL	
productLine	varchar(100)	YES		NULL	
modelName	varchar(255)	YES		NULL	
component	varchar(255)	YES		NULL	
defectType	varchar(255)	YES		NULL	
purchaseDate	date	YES		NULL	
deliveryDate	date	YES		NULL	
usageType	enum('PRIVATE','COMMERCIAL','HOLIDAY_LET')	YES		PRIVATE	
warrantyStatus	enum('COVERED','PARTIAL','EXPIRED','EXCLUDED','REVIEW_NEEDED')	YES		REVIEW_NEEDED	
warrantyPercentage	int	YES		0	
warrantyExpiryDate	date	YES		NULL	
warrantyAnalysisDetails	text	YES		NULL
